headline: Why Investors Are Cautious on Abbott Laboratories (ABT)?
summary: The Mairs & Power, an investment firm, released the first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Mairs & Power Balanced Fund.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund returned -1.77% in the first quarter of 2026, outperforming its benchmark composite index decline of -2.68% as strong stock selection and exposure to Utilities […]

headline: Can ISRG's Digital Roadmap Unlock the Next Phase of Robotic Surgery?
summary: Intuitive Surgical is building an AI-driven surgical ecosystem, using da Vinci 5 data and connected workflows to deepen its robotic surgery moat.

headline: Peripheral Vascular Devices Market by Type, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global peripheral vascular devices market is set to reach USD 13.22 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 5.7% from USD 10.02 billion in 2026. This growth is fueled by the increasing prevalence of vascular disorders like PAD, linked to aging, diabetes, obesity, and smoking. Innovations in minimally invasive devices, such as drug-coated balloons and next-gen stents, are boosting clinical outcomes, while ambulatory surgical centers are driving procedural shifts.
